query:
SELECT 
  i.id AS investigacion_id,
  i.numero,
  i.titulo,
  COUNT(f.id) AS total_fuentes
FROM investigaciones i
LEFT JOIN fuentes f ON i.id = f.investigacionId
GROUP BY i.id, i.numero, i.titulo
ORDER BY i.id;
